title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Berger Silk Store

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Berger Silk Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
